title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Career Launcher - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Career Launcher - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Career Launcher family as a Curriculum Developer in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Career Launcher:
Career Launcher is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Career Launcher!
